prompt_variants.name: baseline
with-skill

forge.mutation_task: Improve a SKILL.md that orchestrates a four-persona adversarial review council from an ignored per-device JSON seat configuration.
mutation_angles: Make first-use setup, live seat refresh, and typed recovery behavior impossible to misread.
Sharpen the distinction between stable persona coverage and changing engine availability without introducing fallback.
Make built-in adapter validation, newly available seat detection, and Gemini prohibition maximally detectable.
Reduce ambiguity in output validation, semantic triage, and final verdict computation.
